title: The Recompense.
content:
All I have lost that could be rapt from me;
    And fare it well: yet, Herrick, if so be
    Thy dearest Saviour renders thee but one
    Smile, that one smile's full restitution.
meaning:
Robert Herrick's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "The Recompense."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
